examples.title: Algorithm: Simple Swing Application
examples.description: Creating a basic Swing application with a JFrame window
examples.code:
ALGORITHM SimpleSwingApplication
INPUT: None
OUTPUT: JFrame window

BEGIN
 CREATE JFrame window
 SET default close operation to EXIT_ON_CLOSE
 SET window size to 300x200 pixels
 CREATE content pane
 ADD components to content pane
 SET window visible
END
examples.explanation: Step-by-step process of creating a basic Swing application
